chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1336 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5200/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 28-10-2025 Mr. Manzoor Hussain N. Larik, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with Dr. Raja Ikram Hussain on behalf of District Health Officer, Khairpur Mirs and Bashir Ahmed, Additional District Accounts Officer, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statement on behalf of Respondent No.4, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. The official respondents today present in Court submit that the current salary has now been released to the Petitioner; however, the arrears will be paid to him within a shortest period of time. After such statement, Counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of this Petition; the same is disposed of with direction to the respondents to oblige their undertaking within three months hereof. In case of failure, the contempt proceedings should be initiated against them. Judge Judge ARBROHI
